note: Single critical OCR/ingestion defect that fragmented a quoted sentence. The words 'support,' and 'including' were separated from the quote and placed before [¶23], while the quote text itself was corrupted (showing 'post- expenses, under appropriate college minority circumstances' instead of the correct 'post-minority support, including college expenses, under appropriate circumstances'). PDF rendering shows the complete correct quote spanning three lines: 'In a divorce action, the court has authority to order payment of post-\nminority support, including college expenses, under appropriate\ncircumstances.' Image-verified via mutool render of PDF page 8-9.
